rationale: For Portugal, the main indirect concern remains energy price uncertainty tied to the Iran deal; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal uncertainty keeps EU energy prices elevated indirectly, affecting Portugal's cost of living and tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Canada-EU unity call before G7 summit
top_events.summary: Canada's PM Carney calls for Canada-EU alignment ahead of G7 — mild positive signal for EU trade and diplomatic stability, marginally relevant for Portugal.

top_events.title: EU migration rules debate
top_events.summary: New EU migration rules under discussion — Portugal as a western EU member has indirect exposure to policy changes affecting labor and border management.
